text: Paracetamol 500mg twice daily morning and evening for 5 days. Take after food. Avoid alcohol.
Amoxicillin 250mg three times daily for 7 days. Complete the full course. Take with water.

medications.precautions: Complete the full course. Take with water.

text: Ibuprofen 400mg when needed every 6 hours. Take with food. Do not exceed 6 tablets in 24 hours.

medications.precautions: Do not exceed 6 tablets in 24 hours.

text: Omeprazole 20mg once daily in the morning before breakfast for 14 days. Avoid prolonged use without doctor advice.

medications.precautions: Avoid prolonged use without doctor advice.

text: Cetirizine 10mg once daily at bedtime for allergies. May cause drowsiness.
Metformin 500mg twice daily with meals. Continue as directed. Do not stop suddenly.

medications.precautions: Continue as directed. Do not stop suddenly.

text: Azithromycin 500mg once daily for 3 days. Take 1 hour before or 2 hours after food.

medications.when: 1 hour before or 2 hours after food

text: Amlodipine 5mg once daily in the morning. Monitor blood pressure. Avoid grapefruit.
Pantoprazole 40mg once daily before breakfast for 4 weeks. Report any stomach pain.
Loratadine 10mg once daily. For hay fever. Avoid driving if drowsy.
